subject: Task 28: Tamper-evident provenance hash chain + verifier script
description: Implement deterministic sha256 hash chain for provenance activities (canonical JSON over activity record + input/output hashes + prev hash), store activity_hash/prev_activity_hash, and add scripts/verify_hash_chain.py (exit 0 OK, 1 tamper) with --simulate-tamper. Produce evidence file .sisyphus/evidence/task-28-hash-chain.txt by running verifier against .local/dev.db.
activeForm: Implement hash chain in apps/api/src/islam_intelligent/provenance/ (use existing prov_models.py). Add scripts/verify_hash_chain.py verifier with --simulate-tamper. Run python scripts/verify_hash_chain.py and record output to .sisyphus/evidence/task-28-hash-chain.txt. Ensure lsp_diagnostics clean on changed files and verifier passes.
